field.label: Ministry / Department Name
field.placeholder: e.g. Ministry of Finance and Economic Management
field.help_text: The Ministry or Department submitting this proposal.

field.label: Subject / Title of Proposal
field.placeholder: e.g. Proposal to Revise the Organisation Structure for the Ministry of …
field.help_text: A concise title that describes what is being proposed.

field.label: Type of Proposal
field.choices: Organisation Restructure Establishment Variation (New Post) Establishment Variation (Regrading) Establishment Variation (Deletion) Both Restructure and Establishment Variation

field.label: Background — Reasons for Seeking Restructure / Establishment Variation
field.placeholder: Insert details of the reasons for seeking the restructure or establishment variation. Include references to relevant government priorities, corporate plans, or operational needs.
field.help_text: Describe the context and justification. Reference national plans (e.g. NSDP), ministry corporate plans, or operational imperatives that make this proposal necessary.

field.label: Policy or Legislative Basis (if applicable)
field.placeholder: Cite any Acts, regulations, government decisions, or policy directives that support this proposal.

field.label: Positions to be Deleted or Re-graded
field.placeholder: List each position to be deleted or re-graded. Include: Post Number, Title, Current Level/Grade, and reason.
field.help_text: If no deletions or re-gradings are proposed, state "None".

field.label: New Positions Being Sought
field.placeholder: List each new position: Title, Proposed Level/Grade, key roles and responsibilities.
field.help_text: Attach a completed Job Description (PSC Form 2-2) for each new position as an attachment.

field.label: Proposed Grading of Each Position
field.placeholder: For each new or re-graded position, state the proposed salary band / grade and justification for the grading.

field.label: Savings from Positions to be Deleted (VUV per annum)
field.help_text: Total annual salary savings from positions being deleted. Enter 0 if not applicable.

field.label: Cost of New / Upgraded Positions (VUV per annum)
field.help_text: Total annual salary cost of all new or upgraded positions, inclusive of VNPF and allowances.

field.label: Net Salary Difference (VUV per annum)
field.help_text: Net cost impact = Cost of new positions minus savings from deleted positions. Use a negative number if there is a net saving.

field.label: Proposed Positions — Detailed Cost Breakdown
field.placeholder: Provide a row-by-row comparison table: Current Post No. | Title/Occupant | Level | Annual Salary | → | Proposed Post No. | Title | Level | Annual Salary | Salary Difference (%) … Attach the OPSC Excel Spreadsheet for full establishment cost calculations including VNPF and allowances.
field.help_text: Use the OPSC-formatted Excel spreadsheet for detailed calculations. Paste a summary here and attach the spreadsheet.

field.label: Current Financial Year Funding Statement
field.placeholder: e.g. If the new position is to be filled in July, only 6/12 of the full-year funding figure (VUV X) will be required in the current financial year. Sufficient funds are / are not available in the current budget.
field.help_text: Required where a position is vacant or new. State whether budget is available to fill the position in the current financial year.

field.label: Funds Allocated for Current Financial Year?
field.choices: Yes — sufficient funds are available No — additional appropriation will be required Not applicable (position is currently funded)

field.label: How the Proposal Will Be Implemented
field.placeholder: Describe the implementation stages: who is responsible, timeframes, and key milestones for the restructure or new establishment.
field.help_text: Include both immediate steps (upon PSC approval) and longer-term phases.

field.label: How Will New Positions Be Filled?
field.choices: Open Advertisement Internal Transfer at Same Grade Acting Arrangement (pending advertisement) Temporary Appointment Contract Appointment Other (describe below)

field.label: Additional Details on Filling Positions
field.placeholder: Provide further details, especially if "Other" was selected above or if multiple positions will be filled differently.

field.label: Implementation Stages / Timeline
field.placeholder: Stage 1: [Description] — Target date: [Month/Year] Stage 2: [Description] — Target date: [Month/Year] …
field.help_text: Provide a clear comparison of the current approved structure and the proposed structure with staged implementation dates.

field.label: Recommendation — What the PSC is Asked to Approve
field.placeholder: It is therefore recommended that the PSC approve: [Insert specific approval sought — e.g. creation of X posts at Grade Y, deletion of Z posts, re-grading of post …]

field.label: Document 1 — Current Organisation Structure (OPSC-stamped)
field.placeholder: Confirmed — Current Organisation Structure (with OPSC stamp) is uploaded
field.help_text: REQUIRED for: Organisation Restructure · Establishment Variation (New Post) · Both. The current structure must carry the OPSC approval stamp. Upload via the Documents panel of this submission.

field.label: Current Structure — File Reference or Description
field.placeholder: e.g. "Org Chart — Ministry of Finance — OPSC approved Jan 2024"
field.help_text: Briefly describe the document uploaded so reviewers can identify it easily.

field.label: Document 2 — Proposed Organisation Structure
field.placeholder: Confirmed — Proposed Organisation Structure chart is uploaded
field.help_text: REQUIRED for: Organisation Restructure · Both. RECOMMENDED for: Establishment Variation (New Post) to show where the new post fits. Upload via the Documents panel of this submission.

field.label: Proposed Structure — File Reference or Description
field.placeholder: e.g. "Proposed Org Chart — Ministry of Finance — Draft v2 May 2025"

field.label: Document 3 — Job Descriptions for New Positions (PSC Form 2-2)
field.placeholder: Confirmed — Completed PSC Form 2-2 for each new position is uploaded
field.help_text: REQUIRED for: Establishment Variation (New Post) · Organisation Restructure (where new posts are created) · Both. A separate PSC Form 2-2 must be completed for EACH new position. Not required for regrading or deletion-only proposals.

field.label: Job Descriptions — Number of Positions Covered
field.help_text: State how many PSC Form 2-2 job descriptions are attached. Enter 0 if not applicable.

field.label: Job Descriptions — File Reference or Description
field.placeholder: List each job description attached, e.g.: 1. PSC Form 2-2 — Senior Finance Officer (Grade 7) 2. PSC Form 2-2 — Data Entry Clerk (Grade 3)

field.label: Document 4 — OPSC Excel Establishment Cost Spreadsheet
field.placeholder: Confirmed — OPSC-formatted Excel cost spreadsheet is uploaded
field.help_text: REQUIRED for: Establishment Variation (New Post) · Establishment Variation (Regrading) · Organisation Restructure (where posts are created or upgraded) · Both. The spreadsheet must include full establishment costs including VNPF and allowances. Obtain the formatted template from OPSC if not already held. Not required for deletion-only proposals.

field.label: Cost Spreadsheet — File Reference or Description
field.placeholder: e.g. "OPSC Establishment Cost — Ministry of Finance — Senior Finance Officer — May 2025"

field.label: Document 5 — Other Supporting Documents
field.placeholder: Yes — additional supporting documents are uploaded
field.help_text: Examples: Cabinet decisions, legal advice, previous PSC correspondence, corporate plan extracts, or any other document that supports this proposal. Upload via the Documents panel of this submission.

field.label: Other Supporting Documents — Description
field.placeholder: List and briefly describe each additional document uploaded, e.g.: 1. Cabinet Decision No. 45 of 2025 — Approval to restructure Ministry 2. Legal Opinion — AG Office — dated 10 March 2025 3. Corporate Plan 2024–2028 — relevant extract (pages 12–14)
field.help_text: Provide enough detail for PSC officers to locate and identify each document in the submission.

field.label: Attachment Completeness — Self-Check
field.choices: All required documents for my proposal type are uploaded Some documents are not yet available — I will submit them separately Not applicable — this is a deletion-only proposal
field.help_text: Please confirm the status of your supporting documents before submitting. Incomplete submissions may be returned for clarification.

field.label: Director's Name
field.placeholder: Full name of the Director submitting this proposal

field.label: Director's Title / Position
field.placeholder: e.g. Director of Corporate Services

field.label: I support/endorse the above proposal from the Director
field.placeholder: Yes — I confirm endorsement of this proposal

field.label: Director-General / Secretary-General Name
field.placeholder: Full name of the Director-General or Secretary-General
